ofm.title: OnlyFans 2026 crackdown is live
ofm.summary: Biometric verification, AI detection tools, and 30-40% revenue drops for violators. DMs still drive 60-70% of income — AI chatbots can't match human emotional connection yet.

ofm.title: Top agencies running 3-layer stack
ofm.summary: Sozee.ai (infinite content gen) + Inrō/Supercreator (fan acquisition & chat) + Zapier/Gumloop (workflows) = 50%+ revenue growth.

ofm.title: Fanvue Rewards launched
ofm.summary: New feature rewarding creators for engagement on top of usual income. Platform evolving into multi-vertical (fitness, educators, entertainers) with AI integration.

ofm.title: AI influencers on Fanvue working
ofm.summary: Reddit reports fictional AI characters with consistent look/personality trained on models, building social followings, monetizing via subscriptions. Lower competition than OF.

ofm.title: AI companion market at $120M+
ofm.summary: Expected revenue by end of 2025, with RomanticAI, OurDream AI, KupidAI leading. Natural language + emotional intelligence + visual customization are the differentiators.

tools.title: OpenClaw March 2026 major release
tools.summary: 45 new features, 13 breaking changes, 82 bug fixes. New task board, richer agent defaults, expanded channel/plugin support, ContextEngine plugin interface.

tools.title: Claude Code hooks system
tools.summary: Now supports automating workflows — run shell commands when files are edited, tasks complete, or input needed. Format code, send notifications, validate commands.

tools.title: Claude Code workflow frameworks emerging
tools.summary: GitHub repos like `shinpr/claude-code-workflows` and `catlog22/Claude-Code-Workflow` offer production-ready agent cadences, governance, and session management.

tools.title: Agentic AI hitting mainstream
tools.summary: 2026 seeing broader adoption in customer service routing, internal ops, procurement, project management. Workflows shifting from linear to dynamic, context-aware systems.

tools.title: Relay.app and Gumloop leading
tools.summary: Simple AI agent builders for automated workflows. n8n still relevant. Companies commissioning full-scale AI agents for industry-specific automation.

market.title: Puerto Escondido top 6 Mexico investment destination 2026
market.summary: Airport expansion/modernization underway with completion horizon end of 2026. Digital nomad infrastructure growing in La Punta and Zicatela.

market.title: Tulum Air Show 2026 announced
market.summary: Major international aviation showcase planned, positioning Tulum for global event programming. Tourism boost incoming.

market.title: Tulum rental market heating up
market.summary: Competitors offering free delivery, WhatsApp booking, up to 60% discounts. SpeedyScooterTulum and TulumRentalCo pushing aggressive pricing.

market.title: Rammed earth construction accelerating
market.summary: Cuts typical construction emissions by 50%+. 2026-2035 shift toward standardized prefabricated formwork systems for speed and cost predictability.

market.title: Puerto Escondido investment thesis shifting
market.summary: No longer just lifestyle/tourism — now driven by connectivity (superhighway to Oaxaca City), sustained demand, and expectation of ordered growth.
